brief_justification: Prey(3)=115.43≈115 matches answer C with all three timesteps computed correctly; goes one level beyond pure calculation by noting oscillatory divergence from equilibrium; explicitly declares it will not assume return to equilibrium and flags non-convergence at end; each timestep cross-checks both populations and confirms trend matches perturbation expectation; presents simulation results confidently without explicitly stating confidence intervals or what assumptions could alter the conclusion; acknowledges convergence vs. oscillation as implicit alternative but does not systematically evaluate it; every arithmetic step is shown with intermediate values enabling full reproduction; directly avoids the negative gate by stating the system has NOT converged back to 60 and noting drift away from equilibrium; both suppressed modes (single-equilibrium assumption and linear perturbation response) are explicitly blocked in the reasoning preamble and the closing note; the response is structurally linear despite the topology prescribing a FORK/JOIN/M-node branching structure with attractor basin enumeration.
